name: THORACIC PARAGANGLIOMA
definition: CHEMODECTOMA rare neural tumor arising from paraganglionic tissue

demographics.Path: extremely vascular well-marginated / irregular mass that may adhere to / envelop /
demographics.Histo: anastomosing cords of granule-storing chief cells arranged in a trabecular pattern;

dominant_finding: hypodense areas ← extensive cystic degeneration / hemorrhage
distribution: sharply marginated 5-7-cm middle / posterior mediastinal mass
discriminating_features: useful and relatively specific for localization purposes
